ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., accelerometer, weight sensor) */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the device */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Specific model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the device is active or inactive */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sample */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the sample */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the sample was collected */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight measurement */,
  "accX" REAL /* Acceleration in the X-axis */,
  "accY" REAL /* Acceleration in the Y-axis */,
  "accZ" REAL /* Acceleration in the Z-axis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity the user was engaged in */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate measurement */,
  "battery_level_at_sample" REAL /* Battery level of the device at the time of data collection */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data sample has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_samples_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_samples_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of device (e.g., accelerometer, weight sensor)
Current firmware version of the device
Indicates whether the device is active or inactive
ID of the user who owns the device
Unique identifier for each data sample
ID of the device that collected the sample
ID of the user who collected the sample
Location where the data was collected
Type of activity the user was engaged in
Battery level of the device at the time of data collection
Score indicating the quality of the data
Indicates whether the data sample has been validated
Date of birth of the user
Date and time when the user account was created
Last date and time the user account was updated
Indicates whether the user account is active or inactive
